name: Redfish Courtbouillon Cajun Style
recipeIngredient: 1 can Rotel® tomatoes with green chiles
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, heavy kettle over medium-high heat, heat oil until hot.
2. Add flour and cook, stirring constantly until roux is medium-dark.
3. Add veggies (onion, green peppers, celery) and cook until wilted and clear.
4. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, sugar, salt, pepper, lemon juice, bay leaf, and seafood stock.
5. Gradually add beer and bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
6. Reduce heat and simmer for 1 to 2 hours, stirring frequently.
7. Add green onions, parsley, and fish. Cook over low heat until fish is done (about 10-15 minutes), avoiding overcooking.
8. Serve over rice.
